## What

<!-- What does this change do? One or two sentences. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem it solves, or the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Checks

- [ ] `node --check assets/diagrams.mjs` passes (if I touched the engine)
- [ ] An affected course passes `npm test` (static check + Playwright smoke)
- [ ] Followed the writing-voice and anti-template rules in `references/`
- [ ] The diff is focused; unrelated changes are in separate PRs
